# FLICK2SPLIT
> Official landing page for FLICK2SPLIT, an AI-powered bill-splitting application.

## About
FLICK2SPLIT is a mobile application that uses AI-powered receipt recognition to help friends split bills fairly and effortlessly.

## Docs
- [How to Use](https://flick2split.com/how-to-use): Step-by-step guide for using FLICK2SPLIT
- [Blog](https://flick2split.com/blog): Tips, stories, and insights about bill splitting

## Blog Posts
- [How FLICK2SPLIT Saved My Friendship](https://flick2split.com/blog/saved-my-friendship)
- [Tips for Fair Bill Splitting](https://flick2split.com/blog/tips-for-fair-bill-splitting)
